sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test_table (id UInt32, text_column String, numeric_column Float64, timestamp_column DateTime);
INSERT INTO fuzz_test_table VALUES (1, 'Test string 1', 1.5, now()), (2, '', 0.0, now()), (NULL, 'NULL id', 3.14, NULL);
SELECT xxHash32(CONCAT(text_column, CAST(numeric_column AS String))) AS hash_value, numeric_column * 2 FROM fuzz_test_table WHERE numeric_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT xxHash64('*' || text_column) AS hash_value FROM fuzz_test_table WHERE timestamp_column >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;

SELECT id, num_hash.hash_value, text_column FROM (SELECT id, xxHash32(text_column) AS hash_value FROM fuzz_test_table) AS num_hash JOIN fuzz_test_table AS base ON base.id = num_hash.id WHERE base.numeric_column > 1.0;
SELECT text_column, COUNT(*) FROM fuzz_test_table GROUP BY text_column HAVING xxHash32(text_column) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, xxHash32(text_column) * numeric_column AS multiplied_hash FROM fuzz_test_table WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL AND numeric_column > 0.0;
WITH hash_results AS (SELECT id, xxHash32(text_column) AS hash_value FROM fuzz_test_table WHERE text_column != '') SELECT hash_value FROM hash_results WHERE hash_value > 0;
CREATE TABLE fuzz_test_table_2 (id UInt32, nested_id UInt32, value Float64);
INSERT INTO fuzz_test_table_2 (id, nested_id, value) VALUES (1, 10, 2.5), (2, 20, NULL), (NULL, 30, 5.5);
SELECT t1.id, xxHash64(CONCAT(t1.value, CAST(t2.value AS String))) AS combined_hash FROM fuzz_test_table_2 AS t1 JOIN fuzz_test_table_2 AS t2 ON t1.id IS NOT NULL AND t2.id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, xxHash32(value) AS hash_value FROM fuzz_test_table_2 WHERE value IS NULL OR value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT nested.id, SUM(nested.value * 2) AS total, xxHash32(text_column) FROM fuzz_test_table AS base JOIN fuzz_test_table_2 AS nested ON base.id = nested.id GROUP BY nested.id, text_column HAVING total > 0;
